task_completion.description: Navigate to the Vicidial admin interface and access the page to add a new script.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vicidial administration web interface is open in a browser, showing the 'ADD NEW SCRIPT' form or the Scripts section.

task_completion.description: Enter the required Script ID and Script Name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Script ID' field is filled with 'NPS_TELECOM_2025' and the 'Script Name' field is filled with 'Telecom NPS Customer Survey'.

task_completion.description: Enter the required comments and set the script to active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Script Comments' field contains 'Net Promoter Score survey for telecom customer satisfaction campaign' and the 'Active' field is set to 'Y'.

task_completion.description: Include the required dynamic tokens in the script text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Script Text' textarea contains the exact strings '--A--first_name--B--', '--A--last_name--B--', and '--A--phone_number--B--'.

task_completion.description: Include the NPS question, follow-up reason question, polite closing, and HTML formatting in the script text.
task_completion.visual_evidence:
The 'Script Text' textarea contains HTML tags (like ,

,
, etc.), the phrase '0 to 10', words like 'recommend' and 'reason', and a polite closing statement.

task_completion.description: Submit the form to save the new script in Vicidial.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message indicating the script was successfully added/modified, or the script 'NPS_TELECOM_2025' is visible in the list of existing scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to interact with the Vicidial GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Vicidial admin interface (http://localhost/vicidial/admin.php), not terminal curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Vicidial application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL should point to the localhost Vicidial admin path, and the interface should match the standard Vicidial layout, rather than a local text editor or mocked HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the GUI by inserting the script directly into the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows showing MySQL commands inserting records into the 'vicidial_scripts' table.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target Script ID is 'NPS_TELECOM_2025' and the Script Name is 'Telecom NPS Customer Survey'. The script text must contain the exact dynamic tokens '--A--first_name--B--', '--A--last_name--B--', and '--A--phone_number--B--'. It must also include NPS concepts such as '0 to 10', 'recommend', and 'reason', be formatted in HTML, and be at least 200 characters long.
